common.tagline: Negotiate your real estate deal like a pro

hero.headline: Negotiate your real estate deal
hero.subheadline: Get a tailored counter-offer strategy, ready-to-send email scripts, and word-for-word verbal scripts — powered by AI. One deal could save you $10,000–$30,000.
hero.social_proof: Takes 2 minutes. No agent. No commission.

how_it_works.heading: How it works
how_it_works.subheading: Three steps to your negotiation package

steps.title: Enter your deal
steps.desc: Tell us your role, the property, asking price, offer on the table, and your priorities.

steps.title: AI analyzes your leverage
steps.desc: CounterPro evaluates market conditions, the offer gap, contingencies, and your timeline.

steps.title: Get your package
steps.desc: Receive a counter-offer number, email script, verbal script, red flags, and your walk-away point.

items.title: Specific counter-offer
items.desc: Not a range. An exact number with the reasoning behind it.

items.title: Copy-paste email script
items.desc: Ready to send. Professional, firm, and strategically worded.

items.title: Word-for-word verbal scripts
items.desc: Know exactly what to say for every scenario — pushback, lowball, walk away.

items.title: Contingency strategy
items.desc: Which terms to fight for, which to concede, and why.

items.title: Red flag detection
items.desc: Financing risks, inspection leverage, market timing — flagged automatically.

items.title: Walk-away point
items.desc: A clear number below which you should walk. No more second-guessing.

pricing.heading: Simple pricing
pricing.subheading: Pay per deal or subscribe for unlimited access

full_suite.title: Full Negotiation Suite
full_suite.desc: AI manages the full back-and-forth. You approve each response before it sends from your own email. Includes thread tracking, deadline alerts, and contingency management.

items.a: Yes. Anyone can negotiate their own real estate deal — this is called FSBO (For Sale By Owner) on the seller side, or an unrepresented buyer on the buyer side. CounterPro is a coaching tool, not a broker.

items.q: Do I need a real estate agent?
items.a: No. That's the point. CounterPro gives you the strategy and scripts to negotiate confidently on your own, potentially saving you the 2-3% agent commission.

CounterPro is powered by Claude, Anthropic's AI. It provides strategy based on the details you enter. It's not a substitute for a licensed attorney on complex legal matters, but for negotiation strategy it's exceptionally thorough.

items.q: What if I need more than one deal?
items.a: Subscribe for $100/month and run unlimited deals. If you're an investor or buying and selling frequently, the subscription pays for itself on the first deal.

cta.heading: Ready to negotiate?
cta.subheading: Stop leaving money on the table. Get your negotiation package in minutes.

features: Full AI negotiation suite per agent

benefits.title: NAR ruling ready
